event.name: Code Fiesta
event.description: Coding contest focusing on algorithms and problem-solving skills.

event.name: Cultural Night
event.description: Music, dance, and drama performances by talented students.

event.name: Robotics Workshop
event.description: Hands-on training on robotics and automation.

event.name: Hackathon 2026
event.description: 48-hour coding marathon to build innovative solutions.

event.name: Music Fest
event.description: Live music performances featuring various genres and artists.
